summary: P6 full-project acceptance is retracted. Backend jar can be packaged and trial-deployed, but frontend is only a typed contract/PageModel layer and has no deployable browser UI. PM, validator and reviewer incorrectly treated tsc --noEmit as frontend build completion. The project must enter P7 frontend UI delivery before it can be called fully deployable.

issues.problem: PM accepted P6 as final/full deployable even though frontend has no browser application entry, no real UI components and no dist artifact.
issues.impact: User was told the project could be packaged/deployed as a complete product, but only backend jar is deployable.
issues.requiredAction: Retract P6 full acceptance, record backend-only trial deployment status, and open P7 frontend UI/deployable package phase.

issues.problem: Frontend contains typed SDK, PageModel, router/store models and TypeScript contract checks only. It lacks index.html, src/main.*, real Vue/React page components, app mounting and dist production build.
issues.impact: There is no deployable frontend UI and no browser page for users to inspect.
issues.requiredAction: Build a real browser frontend application from the existing PageModel/API contracts and produce a clean dist artifact.

issues.problem: Validator called npm.cmd run build pass even though package.json only runs tsc --noEmit and does not generate dist.
issues.impact: Build report confused type checking with deployable frontend build.
issues.requiredAction: Update validation rules and reports to distinguish typed contract, browser app and deployable frontend.

issues.problem: PM did not establish a unified encoding and text-format rule before implementation and acceptance.
issues.impact: Encoding, line ending and build artifact rules were left implicit, causing inconsistent acceptance criteria.
issues.requiredAction: Add .editorconfig and encoding/build artifact rules, and make validator check them.

deferredRisks.reason: Create-system idempotency still uses single-JVM memory storage. Current smoke covers same-process conflict, but production multi-instance consistency needs shared storage or a database idempotency table.
Core OpenAPI error-code matrix is covered. OpenAPI nonce replay, IP whitelist, OpenAPI idempotency conflict and high-concurrency scenarios remain recommended before production launch.

verification: frontend/package.json build currently runs tsc --noEmit only
frontend lacks index.html, src/main.*, framework app mount and dist artifact
.editorconfig and docs/development/encoding.md added to define encoding/build-artifact rules
